_note: Snippet params inside <Component>{#snippet name(params)}...{/snippet}</Component> must receive their types from the consumer's declared Snippet<[...]> signature via contextual typing. We weave each snippet into the parent's prop-check satisfies object as an arrow callback (name: (params) => { body }); the satisfies target pins the arrow's contextual type so destructured/positional params resolve to the tuple element types instead of implicit-any.
